{{Quote|Can it, Suckers. Who else would be stupid enough to brandish a one-of-a-kind custom Widowmaker like that in public?|[[Raal Yorta]]|<ref name="Rookies: Rendezvous">''[[Rookies: Rendezvous]]''</ref>}}
'''Ten-Suckers Madoom''', alias '''Deeto''', was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] criminal noted for his lack of common sense and lack of two fingers/suckers during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He wielded a custom [[Widowmaker (blaster)|Widowmaker]] [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]. Madoom was captured by [[Raal Yorta]] and [[Sammie Staable]] on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], during a game of [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]].
